headline: How Zacks’ Strong Sell Rating and Valuation Concerns Could Reshape Royal Caribbean’s (RCL) Investment Narrative
summary: In recent days, Royal Caribbean Cruises has drawn heightened attention after Zacks assigned it a Rank #5 (Strong Sell), reflecting downward earnings estimate revisions and concerns about its current valuation relative to peers despite revenue growth and a solid net margin. At the same time, the company continues to run nearly 70 ships worldwide, leveraging newer, experience-focused vessels and strong margins to support its longer-term business ambitions even as near-term analyst sentiment...
